expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx implements FilterType = 'all' | 'unread' with useState, handleFilterAll and handleFilterUnread switch between states
Fetch logic is in separate useGetNotifications.ts hook file; NotificationList.tsx imports via '@/hooks/apis/queries/useGetNotifications' with no direct fetch calls in the component
Hook is named useGetNotifications which follows use{Verb}{Resource} pattern (useGet + Notifications)
NotificationList.tsx line 66-71: data-testid='notifications-empty' element rendered when filteredNotifications.length === 0
NotificationList.tsx lines 25-31: error check returns notifications-error element before filter UI renders, so error takes priority over filters
NotificationList.tsx line 42: data-testid='notifications-filter-all' on button element
NotificationList.tsx line 53: data-testid='notifications-filter-unread' on button element
NotificationList.tsx lines 12-13: handleFilterAll and handleFilterUnread use handle prefix
dashboard-notification-filter.spec.ts exists in outputs with Playwright E2E tests covering all/unread filter, empty state, and error scenarios
